{{Hatnote|See {{2|Merchant???}} for the alternative "Merchant".}}

A mysterious Merchant sells his wares in these rooms. He is the primary sink for the {{KW|Gold||2}} the player acquires.

The shop is a {{2|Map Locations|Map Location}} where {{2|Cards}}, {{2|Relics}}, {{2|Potions}} and a Remove can be obtained in exchange for {{KW|Gold||2}}. Shops can also sometimes be found in {{2|Map Locations#Unknown|Unknown}} rooms.


{{TOC limit|3}}

== Items ==
:''See [[Slay the Spire 2:Cards|Cards]] for more info.''
===5 Colored Cards=== 
This will always be 2 Attacks, 2 Skills, and 1 Power belonging to the current player character. One random card will have a 50% discount applied.

==== Prices ====
*'''{{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Common|Common|2}}:''' 48-53 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}}:''' 71-79 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}}:''' 143-158 Gold

<!-- TODO: figure out how/if card weight is affected
==== Weight ====
See how Card weight works [[Cards#Card Distribution|here]]. While shop cards do not affect offset, they are affected by it.
-->
=== 2 Colorless Cards ===
This will always be an {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Uncommon&color:Colorless|Uncommon Colorless|2}} card and a {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare&color:Colorless|Rare Colorless|2}} card. {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} cards cost 15% more than normal cards.

==== Prices ====
*'''{{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}}:''' 82-90 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless&rarity:Rare|Rare|2}}:''' 164-181 Gold

===3 Potions === 
:''See [[Slay the Spire 2:Potions|Potions]] for more info.''
==== Weight ====
* '''{{QueryLink|Potions|rarity:Common|Common|2}} Potion:''' 65%
* '''{{QueryLink|Potions|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} Potion:''' 25%
* '''{{QueryLink|Potions|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} Potion:''' 10%

*'''{{QueryLink|Potions|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} Potion:''' 71-79 Gold

=== 3 Relics ===
:''See [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relics]] for more info.''
The rightmost slot will always be a '''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relic|2}}:''' This is the only way to access Shop relics. If a Shop Relic is purchased via {{R|The Courier||2}}, it will be restocked by a non-Shop Relic. 

==== Weight ====
* '''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} Relic:''' 50%
* '''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} Relic:''' 33%
* '''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} Relic:''' 17%

==== Prices ====
*'''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop|2}} Relic:''' 170-230 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}} Relic:''' 149-201 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} Relic:''' 191-259 Gold
*'''{{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} Relic:''' 234-316 Gold

====Spawn Restrictions====
There are several Relics blacklisted from appearing in the shop:
* {{R|Amethyst Aubergine||2}}
* {{R|Bowler Hat||2}}
* {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}}
* {{R|Old Coin||2}}
* {{R|The Courier||2}}

=== Card Removal Service ===
Allows the player to remove any card in their deck that is not {{KW|Eternal||2}}. Can only be used once per Shop, even with {{R|The Courier||2}}. Its price starts at 75 ({{Asc|6|100|2}}) Gold and increases by 25 ({{Asc|6|50|2}}) each time it is bought at a shop.

== Relic Interactions ==

* {{R|Membership Card||2}} makes everything cost 50% less.
* {{R|Maw Bank||2}} gives 12 Gold every floor. Once you spend gold at the Shop, it will no longer work.
* {{R|The Courier||2}} makes all cards, relics, and potions sold restock when bought. Prices are also reduced by 20%.
** {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop Relics|2}} are NOT restocked.
** Having both this and {{R|Membership Card||2}} will reduce prices by a total 60%. (0.5 * 0.8 = 0.4) 40% price is a 60% reduction.
* {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}} can provide additional gold as Cards are purchased.
* {{R|Lord's Parasol||2}} automatically acquires EVERYTHING the merchant has to offer when entering the shop menu. This includes relics and the card remove. Potions will only be bought if there are open potion slots. Everything will be bought in the order from left to right.
* {{R|Meal Ticket||2}} heals the player for 15 HP every time they enter a shop room.

<!-- not a relic I know -->
* {{P|Foul Potion||2}} can be thrown onto the merchant to gain 100 gold.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**Ascension 6 changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game.
***Base cost of the merchant's card remove increased by 25 to 100 Gold.
***Every subsequent card remove now costs 50 Gold more instead of only 25.
**Relic changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game.
***Base relic cost in the shop is now 25 Gold lower than before.
***Gold generating relics no longer appear at the Merchant.
*'''Early Access v0.102.0 (BETA)'''
**Ascension 6's name and effect were changed from 'Gloom - "Less rest sites."' to 'Inflation - "Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive."'
*'''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
**All relics in the shop now cost 25 Gold less
**Relics that generate Gold (such as Bowler Hat and Amethyst Aubergine) no longer appear at the Merchant
